title: Add post-callback redirect logic (onboarding vs dashboard)
description: After a successful auth callback, check profiles.onboarding_complete to decide where to send the user: new users go to /onboarding/role, returning users go to their role-appropriate dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: handlePostAuth(session) fetches the user's profile from Supabase
If onboarding_complete is false or profile has no role, redirect to /onboarding/role
If role is 'tenant' and onboarding_complete is true, redirect to /search
If role is 'landlord' and onboarding_complete is true, redirect to /listings
If profile fetch fails, redirect to /onboarding/role as a safe fallback
